title: Episia: Open-source epidemiology and biostatistics for Python
description: Open-source Python epidemiology and biostatistics toolbox. Based on OpenEpi algorithms; risk ratios, odds ratios, sample size, diagnostic test evaluation, compartmental epidemic models (SIR/SEIR/SEIRD), Monte Carlo sensitivity analysis, surveillance data tools, and automated report generation. Built for the francophone African public health context.
